stylesheet_protocol.fact: Stepper ribbon refactored to enforce styles.py protocol: removed all inline setStyleSheet() with hardcoded hex colors, replaced inline QFont() with create_font(), replaced setCursor(Qt.PointingHandCursor) with set_hand_cursor(). Added get_stepper_button_style() and get_stepper_arrow_style() helpers to styles.py with 4 states: error/completed/active/pending.

Added setObjectName to all key widgets in BlockConfigItem and StrategyBlocksPanel for Qt testability (pytest-qt targeting) and stylesheet targeting. 17 object names added across position_label, block_name_label, logic_badge, signals_label, up_button, down_button, remove_button, signals_widget, blocks_scroll_area, blocks_container, empty_label, strategy_exit_section, strategy_exits_container.

qt_thread_safety.fact: Replaced QThread with QThreadPool+QRunnable in LogViewerWindow to eliminate SIGABRT crash. QThread cleanup in closeEvent also required (BTCAAAAA-26364). Key pattern: use QThreadPool for worker threads, not raw QThread, to avoid Qt thread lifecycle issues.
Added sip.isdeleted() guard to _update_display() to prevent RuntimeError on window close. This is a recurring pattern needed whenever a slot may fire after the widget is destroyed.

log_viewer_performance.fact: Log viewer freeze fixed by switching from QTextEdit to QPlainTextEdit, adding QSyntaxHighlighter for line classification, implementing lazy loading with line caps, and moving file I/O to background thread. Pre-classified line filtering added in BTCAAAAA-26451.
Toggle-all filter updates batched to prevent redundant per-checkbox tab refreshes in block search panel. Performance optimization for filter preset save/load.

window_geometry.fact: Window maximize state desync fixed by moving setWindowState(WindowMaximized) to after super().showEvent(). WindowGeometryMixin with changeEvent override added (BTCAAAAA-26161) to fix maximize button second-click behavior.

Multi-monitor window geometry persistence fixed: screenAt() fallback for None screen, maximized_screen_name honored when saved_pos is not None, showMaximized timer delay increased to 50ms, deep fix for Qt window state desync after drag.

ai_provider_integration.fact: Added OpenRouter and DeepSeek AI providers with curated model dropdowns in Settings dialog. AI_PROVIDER combo registered on save (BTCAAAAA-26185). Settings tests updated for combo-based model fields.
Budget-threshold-based LLM provider switching automation. DeepSeek/OpenRouter providers with multi-provider cost tracking CLI (BTCAAAAA-26430).

nautilus_integration.fact: NautilusCodeGenerator production module implemented with builder UI hook. ValidationReportWindow restored as primary step 1 Validate UI with Generate Code button (BTCAAAAA-25636).
Quick Preview button added — runs 30-day background backtest with metrics popup. end_date floored to midnight UTC to prevent date boundary issues (BTCAAAAA-26132).

calibration_and_caching.fact: Calibration cache with fingerprint-based skip implemented. Fingerprint persisted to disk across restarts (BTCAAAAA-1092). Cache preserved across backtest window close/reopen (BTCAAAAA-640).

utc_timestamp_compliance.fact: Systematic fix of tz-naive vs tz-aware datetime mismatches across data_update_modal.py, unified_manager.py, backtest_config_panel.py, and Quick Preview. All timestamps now use UTC.

strategy_builder_restoration.fact: Full strategy builder module (src/strategy_builder/, src/optimizer_v3/, src/data_manager/, src/utils/) restored from main branch after branch merge. 164 files, 86,970 lines of code.

impact_gate_and_workers.fact: Impact Gate worker implemented — scans done fix issues for quality gate. Includes process_issue, muted state, comment builder functions (BTCAAAAA-26692). Backfill_null_closed_at added to bug-close ingestion worker (BTCAAAAA-26708).
Backup Dead-Man-Switch Monitor implemented with full test suite and docs. Hourly auto-retry for muted ERROR entries, stale threshold bumped to 15min (BTCAAAAA-26623).
Touch Index bug-close ingestion worker with full test suite. FR ingestion worker with systemd units, setup script, runbook (BTCAAAAA-26667). 477/477 tests passing.

impact_gate_pipeline.fact: Impact Gate scan-done pipeline verified: 127/127 done fix issues gated at 100% coverage. Pipeline uses 3 GitHub Actions workflows (scan-done every 5 min, health-check every 10 min, worker on dispatch). Key scripts: scan_fix_issues_done.py, impact_gate_scan_health.py, impact_gate_runner.py. Core module at src/impact_gate/worker.py. Data quality snapshots at data_quality_impact_gate_*.json. Health check validates snapshot freshness (<15min), coverage (>90%), error rate (<35%), fail rate (<35%). On-disk verification on 2026-05-16 confirmed HEALTHY status with 0% error rate, 0% fail rate, 0 ungated.

Fixed 4 production issues in Impact Gate scan-done pipeline: (1) untracked snapshot files not committed — added git ls-files fallback, (2) lock file leaked from _unlock_muted_state — added lock_path.unlink(), (3) missing [skip ci] in auto-commit messages, (4) inconsistent coverage formulas — unified to read coverage_pct from scan output JSON. Verified: commit 4efd6e11, 184/184 tests, 100% coverage, 0 ungated.

key_patterns: Stylesheet protocol enforcement — all style values from styles.py, zero hardcoded values in components
QThreadPool over raw QThread for worker threads to prevent SIGABRT crashes
sip.isdeleted() guards on all slots that may fire after widget destruction
UTC-only timestamp policy across all data and UI layers
Multi-monitor window geometry with screenAt() fallback
Background I/O for file operations to prevent UI thread blocking
setObjectName on all widgets for pytest-qt testability
